title: Gemini CLI: Summarizing Long Documents and Reports
description: Use Gemini CLI's long-context capabilities to summarize lengthy PDFs, reports, and documents directly from the command line.

resources.title: Gemini CLI Repository
resources.description: Installation and usage guide for the Gemini CLI tool

resources.title: Google AI Studio
resources.description: Get a Gemini API key to use with Gemini CLI

resources.title: Summarize a document with Gemini CLI
resources.description: Install Gemini CLI and summarize a long document in one command
resources.command: npm install -g @google/gemini-cli && gemini 'Summarize the key points of this document' --file report.pdf

resources.title: Gemini CLI Document Analysis Tutorial
resources.search_keyword: Gemini CLI document summary long context tutorial 2026

quiz.question: What is the main strength highlighted in this lesson for Gemini CLI?
quiz.explanation: This lesson focuses on Gemini CLI's ability to handle long context and summarize reports and documents.

quiz.question: Why is a CLI workflow useful for document summaries?
options: It lets you automate repeatable summary tasks from the terminal
It removes the need for prompts
quiz.explanation: CLI tools are useful because they fit into repeatable terminal workflows and scripts.

quiz.question: What does the lesson use as an example input?
options: A long PDF or report file
quiz.explanation: The example command summarizes a long report file passed with `--file`.
